description: A plain candid color photograph (no on-image text or graphic design) of a U.S. Border Patrol agent on horseback patrolling a grassy brush-covered trail. The lead agent wears a green Border Patrol uniform, white cowboy hat, sunglasses, and a duty belt with sidearm, mounted on a dark bay horse with a saddlebag pack. Two additional mounted agents follow in the background along the path under a clear blue sky. The image documents the Border Patrol Horse Patrol unit and was posted to mark the 95th anniversary of the U.S. Border Patrol. There is no overlaid text, slogan, or logo, so it is a routine photograph rather than a designed meme/poster.
